mapper.select: SELECT m.id_device FROM ${datatablename} m WHERE m.id_device = #{id_device} AND m.time >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -120 MINUTE) LIMIT 1

SELECT d.id, d.datatablename, e.id AS id_error FROM device d LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id_device_group = d.id_device_group AND e.error_code = 1001 AND e.`status` = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0 WHERE d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.serial_number = #{serial_number} AND d.id_device_group = 19 LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.id_device, a.start_date, a.end_date FROM `alert` a WHERE a.id_device = #{id_device} AND a.id_error = #{id_error} AND a.`status` = 1 AND a.is_delete = 0 AND a.start_date IS NOT NULL AND a.end_date IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT d.id, d.datatablename, e.id AS id_error, d.id AS id_device, d.serial_number FROM device d LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id_device_group = d.id_device_group AND e.error_code = 1001 AND e.`status` = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0 WHERE d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.id_site = #{id} AND d.id_device_group = 19
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `alert_queue`( `id_device`, `id_error`, `start_date`, `end_date` ) VALUES ( #{id_device}, #{id_error}, #{start_date}, #{end_date} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE start_date = #{start_date}, is_queue = 0
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS id
mapper.select:
(SELECT a.id_device, a.id_error, a.start_date, a.end_date FROM `alert` a WHERE a.id_device = #{id_device} AND a.id_error = #{id_error} AND a.`status` = 1 AND a.is_delete = 0 AND a.start_date IS NOT NULL AND a.end_date IS NULL LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL ( SELECT a.id_device, a.id_error, a.start_date, a.end_date FROM `alert_queue` a WHERE a.id_device = #{id_device} AND a.id_error = #{id_error} AND a.`status` = 1 AND a.is_delete = 0 AND a.start_date IS NOT NULL AND a.end_date IS NULL AND a.is_queue = 0 LIMIT 1)

SELECT a.id_device, a.id_error, a.start_date, a.end_date FROM `alert` a WHERE a.id_device = #{id_device} AND a.id_error = #{id_error} AND a.`status` = 1 AND a.is_delete = 0 AND a.start_date IS NOT NULL AND a.end_date IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT d.id, d.id_site, d.devicename, d.datatablename, d.job_tablename, d.last_updated, d.id_device_group, s.start_date_time, s.end_date_time, t.`value` AS timezone_value, e.id AS id_error, d.id AS id_device FROM device d INNER JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site AND s.`status` = 1 INNER JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id_device_group = d.id_device_group AND e.error_code = 1001 AND e.`status` = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0 WHERE d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.id_device_type NOT IN (5) AND d.disable_alert = 1 AND d.serial_number = #{serial_number} AND e.id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.id

SELECT d.id, d.id_site, d.devicename, d.datatablename, d.job_tablename, d.last_updated, d.id_device_group, s.start_date_time, s.end_date_time, t.`value` AS timezone_value, e.id AS id_error, d.id AS id_device FROM device d INNER JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site AND s.`status` = 1 INNER JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id_device_group = d.id_device_group AND e.error_code = 1001 AND e.`status` = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0 WHERE d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.disable_alert = 1 AND d.id_site = #{id} AND e.id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.id

SELECT IF(COUNT(*) = 0 OR SUM(IF(IFNULL(u.error, 0) > 0, 1, 0)) = COUNT(*), 1, 0) AS is_no_comm, IFNULL(MIN(u.time),NOW()) AS start_date, MAX(u.time) AS end_date FROM ${datatablename} u WHERE u.time >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -2 HOUR)
